summary.summary_250: The first chunk describes a market report showing slowing smartphone shipments in mature regions.
summary.summary_1000: The first chunk describes a market report showing slowing smartphone shipments in mature regions while mid-range devices remain resilient.
summary.tldr: Shipments slowed in mature smartphone markets.

summary.summary_250: The final chunk argues that vendor margins are being protected by services revenue and longer device replacement cycles.
summary.summary_1000: The final chunk argues that vendor margins are being protected by services revenue and longer device replacement cycles, even as unit growth softens.
summary.tldr: Services revenue and longer replacement cycles protected margins.
